from databricks.sdk import WorkspaceClient

# 1. Initialize Databricks workspace client
w = WorkspaceClient(
    host="https://dbc-5be2f783-1fe1.cloud.databricks.com", 
    token="dapic7ec3be5185c33a7840c789cf43c4518" 
)

# 2. Define the local path of the generated file
local_file_path = "D:/DE Project/mobility/traffic_data/traffic_bronze/traffic_data.json" 

# 3. Define the destination path in Databricks Volume
dbfs_path = "/Volumes/workspace/default/traffic_data/traffic_bronze/traffic_data.json"

# 4. Upload the file to Databricks
print("Uploading data to Databricks...")
with open(local_file_path, "rb") as f:
    w.files.upload(dbfs_path, f)
print("Data uploaded successfully. Ready for processing!")
